# Be Secure Locksmith

> Licensed, family-operated mobile locksmith serving Gainesville, Ocala, and North Central Florida since 2012. Residential, commercial, and automotive lock and key services — lockouts, rekeys, car keys, and installs — rated 4.9 stars across 2,500+ reviews.

Be Secure Locksmith is a mobile locksmith company: technicians come to you across the Gainesville and Ocala metro region, typically on-site in about 30 minutes. Call 352-706-5295 for fast service.

## Main
- [Home](https://besecurelocksmith.com/): Mobile locksmith services across Gainesville & Ocala, FL — lockouts, rekeys, car keys, and installs.
- [About](https://besecurelocksmith.com/about/): Meet the team behind Gainesville's most-reviewed locksmith
- [Price List](https://besecurelocksmith.com/price-list/): See upfront locksmith pricing for Gainesville and Ocala, FL
- [Contact](https://besecurelocksmith.com/contact-us/): Need a locksmith in Gainesville or Ocala, FL? Reach our licensed mobile team for home, car, and business lock service
- [Testimonials](https://besecurelocksmith.com/testimonials/): Read why Gainesville and Ocala, FL trust Be Secure for lockouts, rekeys, and car keys

## Services
- [Residential Locksmith](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/residential-locksmith/): Securing your home in Gainesville, FL? Our residential locksmiths handle rekeys, lock installs, and lockouts with fast, local serv
- [Commercial Locksmith](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/commercial-locksmith/): Securing a business in Gainesville, FL? Our commercial locksmiths handle access control, master keys, and panic hardware
- [Automotive Locksmith](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/automotive-locksmith/): Locked out of your car in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile auto locksmiths handle lockouts, key replacement, and fob programming on sit
- [Emergency Lockouts](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/emergency-lockouts/): Locked out in Gainesville, FL? Our emergency mobile locksmiths reach you fast for home, car, and business lockouts
- [Car Key Programming](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/car-key-programming/): Need a key fob programmed in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile locksmiths program transponder keys and fobs for most vehicles on site
- [Car Key Replacement](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/car-key-replacement/): Lost your car key in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile auto locksmiths cut and program replacement keys and fobs for most makes on site
- [Ignition Repair](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/ignition-repair/): Key stuck in the ignition in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile auto locksmiths repair and replace ignitions for most vehicles on site
- [Key Duplication](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/key-duplication/): Need a key copied in Gainesville, FL? We duplicate house, office, and car keys accurately with fast, local mobile service
- [Lock Rekeying](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/lock-rekeying/): Moving or lost a key in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile locksmiths rekey your locks fast so old keys no longer work
- [Lock Repair](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/lock-repair/): Sticky or broken lock in Gainesville, FL? Our mobile locksmiths repair locks and hardware so you can fix it before replacing it
- [New Lock Installation](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/new-lock-installation/): Upgrading locks in Gainesville, FL? Our local locksmiths install deadbolts, knobs, and high-security hardware for homes and busine
- [Smart Lock Installation](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/smart-lock-installation/): Want keyless entry in Gainesville, FL? Our local locksmiths recommend and install smart locks for homes and businesses, set up rig
- [Mailbox Lock Installation](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/mailbox-lock-installation/): Need a mailbox lock in Gainesville, FL? Our local locksmiths install and replace mailbox locks for homes, HOAs, and property manag
- [Master Key Systems](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/master-key-systems/): Need a master key system in Gainesville, FL? Our commercial locksmiths design keying that gives you one key and full control
- [Interchangeable Core Locks](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/interchangeable-core-locks/): Need IC core locks in Gainesville, FL? Our commercial locksmiths install and rekey interchangeable cores for flexible access contr
- [Safe Locksmith](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/safe-locksmith/): Locked out of a safe in Gainesville, FL? Our locksmiths open, repair, and service home and business safes with careful, local work
- [Property Management](https://besecurelocksmith.com/services/property-management/): Managing rentals in Gainesville, FL? Our locksmiths handle turnover rekeys, master keys, and lock installs for property managers
